title: SQL: relaxing subqueries
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id Int32, name String, age Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO users SELECT MAX(id) + 1, 'Charlie', NULL FROM users;
INSERT INTO users SELECT COALESCE(MAX(age), 0) + 1, 'David', 35 FROM users;
key_bug_features: subquery in insert statement with max function
